summary: A Fox News interview with Acting ICE Director Todd Lyons saying Chicago protesters are advocating for hardened criminals (TdA members, child rapists, fentanyl dealers), with Broadview, IL protest/arrest b-roll. It is a broadcast news interview, not a produced or music-driven spectacle.
notable_text: FOX NEWS; 'ILLINOIS GOV DEFIES TRUMP CALLS FOR ARREST'; 'Todd Lyons | Acting I.C.E. Director'
